nonBlockingIssues.description: `Identity` still persists an optional `username`, while the architecture says username/endpoint metadata belongs to `Host`. This predates the fix and does not block milestone validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax the red-first guidance for bootstrap-hardening work so workers may first make a narrowly scoped safety fix before adding an isolated smoke harness when reproducing the failure directly would require destructive changes to the real SDK/AVD environment.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `harden-bootstrap-check-recovery` rerun fix had to prove partial-SDK/AVD failure handling safely. The reviewer found the worker's deviation from strict red-first sequencing justified because destructive reproduction against the real toolchain would have violated worker safety constraints.
